div.p: Strict Sequence Requirement: The 8259A state machine requires ICW1-ICW4 to be written in exact order. A write to the Data Port (0x21/0xA1) immediately following ICW1 is internally routed to the ICW2 register.
Master: 0x04 Bit 2 = 1 (Binary 00000100) Indicates Slave is on IRQ2
Slave: 0x02 ID = 2 Identifies self to Master IRQ
